name: migration
description: Code migration workflow: analyze impact, migrate, verify

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Directory or module scope for the migration

team.name: migrator
team.role: Migration specialist — methodical, incremental migration with zero data loss

tasks.title: Analyze migration impact
tasks.description:
Analyze what is needed to migrate from {{from}} to {{to}} in {{scope}}.

Produce migration-plan.md:
1. Breaking changes between {{from}} and {{to}}
2. Files affected with specific changes needed
3. Dependency updates required
4. Migration order (least-dependent files first)
5. Risk assessment and rollback strategy
6. Verify current tests pass before starting

tasks.title: Execute migration
tasks.description:
Execute the migration from {{from}} to {{to}} following migration-plan.md.

Rules:
- Follow the planned migration order
- Update dependencies first, then code
- Update imports, types, and API calls
- Keep changes compilable at each step
- All tests must pass after migration

expectations.criteria: Migration is complete, all references to the old API/library are removed, code compiles, and tests pass
